creator: khera@kcilink.com
text:
make readmes breaks in the korean directory

Fix: 

remove korean from ports ;-)
How-To-Repeat: 
	
cd /usr/ports
env USA_RESIDENT=YES make readmes

ultimately ends up with:

===> java/tya
===>   Creating README.html for tya-1.7
===> korean
===>  Creating README.html
make: don't know how to make package-name. Stop
make: don't know how to make package-name. Stop
make: don't know how to make package-name. Stop
===> korean/Wnn
===>   Creating README.html for ko-Wnn-4.2
===> korean/acroread-korfont
===>   Creating README.html for ko-acroread-korfont-1999.7.20
===> korean/afterstep
make: don't know how to make readmes. Stop
*** Error code 2

Stop.
*** Error code 1

Stop.
